name: Baked Beans
recipeIngredient: 2 cans baked beans (no added salt), drained
1 can butter beans (no added salt), drained
1 can kidney beans (no added salt), drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Cube the bacon and fry in a large skillet over medium heat until crispy. Drain on paper towels.
3. In the same skillet, brown the ground beef with chopped onion over medium heat until no longer pink. Drain excess fat.
4. In a large bowl, combine the baked beans, butter beans, kidney beans, brown sugar, mustard, vinegar, ketchup, and chopped onion.
5. Pour the mixture into two 2-quart baking dishes.
6. Bake for 1 hour or until heated through and slightly crispy on top.
